name: NFR 5: Delete User Account (Soft Deactivate) — Performance Test
description: Validate performance and correctness of soft-deleting (deactivating) a user account by updating status via PATCH under concurrent load.
preconditions: Test users must exist and be in "active" status.
Users should not have pending transactions that prevent deletion.

metrics.target value: Deactivated users must not appear in /users/active

notes: Data integrity verification required: ensure deactivated users do not appear in /users/active.
